games.explanation: The market has ARI as a +140 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Eduardo Rodriguez keeps ARI competitive on the mound against Kyle Bradish. The sim projects ARI to plate 5.2 runs — expect some fireworks.
MIN is getting plus-money at +114 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Simeon Woods Richardson keeps MIN competitive on the mound against Connelly Early. MIN holds a commanding 74-point Elo edge.
The market has WSN as a +150 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Wind blowing out — balls are carrying. Pitcher's park suppresses the long ball.
